drafts.caption:
CME activity is elevated. Review coronagraph and ENLIL context before sharing. Open Gaia Eyes for the full signal read.

#GaiaEyes #SpaceWeather #EarthSignals

visual_style.notes: Use a dark navy/black gradient, subtle spectrogram texture, small Gaia Eyes branding, one glass text panel, up to eight context chips, and no more than two metrics.
